content:
﻿We've just published ComponentizeJS v0.20.0! This is a breaking release: downstream projects depending on wasi will need to update their wasi imports to 0.2.10.

https://www.npmjs.com/package/@bytecodealliance/componentize-js/v/0.20.0
https://github.com/bytecodealliance/ComponentizeJS/releases/tag/0.20.0

Highlights:

  • the release brings back AOT compilation support via weval,
  • wasi version upgraded to 0.2.10,
  • StarlingMonkey has been upgraded to v0.3.0, based on the newest stable Firefox release,

Please download from usual places and give it a try
